scope: One-seed, one-exact-MatPES-pass physical-representation transfer from the qualified 34.28M GaugeFlow-base A1 EMA checkpoint, with simultaneous Alex-MP generative replay. This is not tensor conditioning, online energy guidance, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.

prerequisites.teacher_feature_contract: type-matched per-atom 128-dimensional feature_dict['readout']; PBE rows only; offline stop-gradient targets

data.split_grouping: matpes_id across all six artifacts and both functionals

training.distributed_semantics: rank-sharded data, globally weighted and summed gradients, one rank-0 optimizer/EMA owner, train-parameter broadcast after every update; EMA is checkpointed and evaluated only on rank 0
training.precision: bf16 learned matmuls with FP32 geometry and reductions
training.feature_loss: graph-equal mean of type-matched per-atom cosine distance

evaluation.physical_panel: fixed MatPES calibration split, separately reported for PBE and r2SCAN

decision_rule.pass: qualify Stage-B physical representation transfer while retaining the bounded GaugeFlow-base generation law
decision_rule.physical_pass_generation_regression: retain the Stage-B checkpoint only as a physical encoder candidate and diagnose replay/optimization before any Stage-C continuation
decision_rule.generation_pass_physical_fail: retain A1 as production and do not scale to LeMat; diagnose target normalization, feature extraction and head optimization
decision_rule.boundary: LeMat code and bounded smokes may be prepared in parallel, but no full LeMat continuation, tensor adapter, RL, relaxation, DFT or DFPT is authorized by this protocol. Short-bond improvement is reported rather than manufactured by threshold tuning.
